description: Isolates a bug where the TypeInspector fails to resolve a deeply nested field because it loses the correct file-scoped import context during recursive searches. A correct implementation must switch to the context of a type's defining file when resolving its members.

assertNodes.description: The deepest path should resolve through three layers of structs.

assertOnSubExpression.description: Step 1: L1Data should resolve to the layer1 type.
Step 2: L2Data should resolve to the layer2 type.
Step 3: L3Data should resolve to the layer3 type.
Step 4: FinalItem should resolve to the models data type.

assertNodes.description: The alias path should resolve through a type alias in an intermediate package.

assertOnSubExpression.description: Step 1: L2Alias should resolve through the alias to the layer3 type.
Step 2: FinalItem should resolve to the models data type.
